form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 2nd of 8 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn on March 17 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Frostisen carrying 59kg at $4.20. Should come on following that hit-out and looks set to break the maiden status.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Was well in the market at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Beaumont (Newcastle) F&M Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1150m, slow going 0.6 len behind Chisato carrying 57.5kg at $5. Nice debut but poorly drawn for this, place best.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Virgil's Gift with 55.5kg at $41. On debut tenth of 12 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw October 9 over 1100m, 8 len behind Nesrine carrying 55kg at $13. Everything points to a positive return.

On debut seventh of 12 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn September 25 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Greyt Thinker carrying 59kg at $12. Expecting a bright return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, bumped Shadashi carried that runner out.
Shortly after the start, bumped by The Big Blue.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently held ground to the line 3rd of 13 at Muswellbrook Super Mdn on March 27 over 1280m, slow going 0.9 len behind Overzone with 55.5kg at $5.50. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Muswellbrook Super Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1280m, 1.75 len behind Olympian with 56.5kg at $6.50. Will take plenty of beating with the key jockey change.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near 1200m, had to be steadied and carried into the line of Exploding World.
Slow to begin and shortly after bumped by Kamov.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 10 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Blue Suede Hooves carrying 58.5kg at $9. Last start raced on the pace before fading second last of 11 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn on March 26 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Am I Dreaming carrying 54kg at $81. Rates highly. Needs to find a few more lengths.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping by Riga. Raced keenly in the early stages.
On jumping made contact with Waveton. Bumped on jumping by Blue Suede Hooves.
On jumping shifted out and bumped Kumbaya.
